Template Description: Filmhub CSV Metadata 3.0 - Filmhub Movies & Shows
Movie/Show Synopsis: The Caminandes cartoon series follows our hero Koro the Llama as he explores Patagonia, attempts to overcome various obstacles, and becomes friends with Oti the "pesky" penguin.
Movie/Show Sales Pitch: Short animated films made in the Netherlands by the Blender Institute, well known for realizing the open source short animation films "Big Buck Bunny" and "Sintel". Crowd funded, they use a complete open source pipeline for producing high quality visual effects.
Festivals: Festival de Córdoba, Best Score for an Animated Short Film
Tag(s): Crowdfund, Desert, animals, blender, children, lakes, llama, mountain, nature, open source, penguin, south america, vfx
Episode Synopsis: Koro has trouble crossing an apparent desolate road, a problem that an unwitting Armadillo does not share.
